name: Lois' Chunky Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 or 3 hot peppers (chopped), I used jalapeno
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large granite pan.
2. Cook for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches the desired thickness.
3. Pour into jars and seal.
4. Makes about 8 pints.
